seo.title: Building RAG Pipeline with Flowise + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build rag pipeline with Flowise + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Flowise enables rapid development of RAG pipelines through its drag-and-drop interface, combining vector stores, retrieval nodes, and LLM synthesis for document-based Q&A. However, chatflow chains often produce unvalidated outputs, retrieve irrelevant context, or fail silently in custom tools, leading to hallucinations and untrustworthy responses. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure source faithfulness, context relevance, and citation accuracy in these high-risk pipelines.

architectureOverview.heading: RAG Pipeline Architecture with Flowise
architectureOverview.description:
A typical Flowise RAG pipeline starts with a Chat Input node that triggers a Vector Store Retriever to fetch relevant document chunks from embeddings stored in Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar. Retrieved contexts pass through a Context Assembler or Prompt Template node that formats them with the user query for an LLM node (e.g., OpenAI or Anthropic) to generate a synthesized response. Source attribution is handled via Citation or Document Metadata nodes, while custom Tool nodes may enrich retrieval with external APIs.

The flow often includes conditional routing for multi-agent handoffs or fallback retrievers, but lacks built-in validation of intermediate outputs like retrieval relevance or LLM faithfulness to sources. This creates risks in sequential chains where context degrades between nodes. Vex integrates as a callback handler to monitor and verify each stage.

Key components include: Vector Store Tool → Retrieval QA Chain → LLM Response → Citation Generator, with potential agentic loops for iterative refinement.

risks.name: Chatflow chains producing unvalidated intermediate outputs
risks.description: Retrieval nodes output raw document chunks without relevance scoring, passed directly to LLM
risks.mitigation: Vex relevance checks on retrieved contexts before LLM synthesis

risks.name: Vector store retrieval returning low-relevance documents
risks.description: Semantic search returns semantically distant chunks due to embedding drift or query ambiguity
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic similarity scoring with configurable thresholds

risks.name: Custom tool nodes failing silently without error propagation
risks.description: External API tools or document loaders fail without triggering flow errors
risks.mitigation: Vex tool call monitoring and fallback execution

risks.name: Multi-agent sequential flow losing context between agent handoffs
risks.description: Context truncation or reformatting between agent nodes drops source attribution
risks.mitigation: Vex context continuity verification across handoffs
